LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT TIERRA-DERCO INTERNATIONAL, LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Laurence Vinocur's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Tierra-Derco International, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
